title: 3.5 Inch Tailoring Straight Sharp Tip Scissors Stainless Steel Stork Craft
description:
The 3.5 inch Tailor's Stork Scissors are a great addition to any hobbyist's tool collection. These scissors are designed with straight blades and a super sharp tip, perfect for embroidering, sewing and cutting fabric. Each pair of scissors is stainless steel and constructed in Pakistan. They even have a cute Stork imprint. Grab a pair of these before your next craft project, or gift them to your favorite hobbyist.
